programme.title: CNN Newsroom: Tuesday, May 19, 2026 3Am ET:CNN Newsroom E358
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: One World: Tuesday, May 19, 2026 12Pm ET:Season 1 E99
programme.desc: Zain Asher and Bianna Golodryga cover the top global and national issues of the day.

programme.title: The Brief With Jim Sciutto: Tuesday, May 19, 2026 6Pm ET:Season 2 E98
programme.desc: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

programme.title: E7 - A. Birds of a Feather/Vampire Mouse
programme.desc: Ginger is in charge of taking care of her mother's bird and Tom tries his hardest to keep from eating the bird.

programme.title: E415 - Quick Meal/Digital Taming/Glacial Carrot
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers a special lamp that can compact organic elements. Lemmings, for example.

programme.title: E94 - B. Friends Forever/Jermaine/Chips and Ice Cream/Graybles 1000+/Hoots
programme.desc: Ice King plots to form a perfect circle of confidantes.

programme.title: E3 - Rigby's Body/It's Time/Out Of Commission/Firework Run/Journey To The Bottom Of The Cr
programme.desc: When Rigby eats too much junk food, his body forces out his consciousness. Rigby, Mordecai and Skips set out on a quest to get it back before sunset.

programme.title: E6 - B. Shirley the Medium/McPherson Phantom/The Ride of the Valkyries/Scuba-Scuba Doo/Jou
programme.desc: While digging in search of his lost yo-yo, Courage finds a locked box that once belonged to Eustace's decreased brother, Horst. Believing the box contains his brother's money, Eustace tries to open it and fails. Seeking help.

programme.title: E252 - Wind Some, Lose Some/Bounty Ball/Fear The Fogg/Super-Villain Team-Up/Digital Quality
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Grandpa Max find the Weatherheads using the towering turbines for their latest nefarious plan.

programme.title: E23 - Welcome To The Space/Deca Wants To Be The Next World President
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found at the space museum. Shiro & Deca sniff their way in. When Deca presses a button by mistake, the space ship they are on starts moving.

programme.title: E134 - Emotional Support Duck / End Of The Leash Gags: Tennis / Adopt Me!/Bathy Daffy/End Of
programme.desc: Porky pretends Daffy is his emotional support duck. Foghorn plays a painful game of tennis. Charlie Dog lets everyone know he's the greatest dog ever.

programme.title: Panellets
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula prepare a sweet treat as they mix ingredients, shape the dough, and decorate their creations while having fun in the kitchen.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: We Are Superheroes!
programme.desc: It's superhero time as the doctors' alter-egos go into battle to show the secret powers of your skin, which uses Vitamin D from the sun to make your bones strong! And Dr. Raph is on duty for incredible eye surgery.

programme.title: Fascinating Fossils
programme.desc: Were all dinosaurs reptiles? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of palaeontology. Have hands-on fun by creating a dinosaur egg, and get to know Teuku Jacob, who used fossils and remains to study the origins and predecessors of present human species.

programme.title: We Are Superheroes!
programme.desc: It's superhero time as the doctors' alter-egos go into battle to show the secret powers of your skin, which uses Vitamin D from the sun to make your bones strong! And Dr. Raph is on duty for incredible eye surgery.

programme.title: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Ian goes to the Video Game Hall of Fame. Back at the garage, Jesse and Julia stretch the meaning of “Hall of Fame” to the limits.

programme.title: Wet Creatures and Strange Hiding Places
programme.desc: Perhaps Planet Earth should be called Planet Wetness, since it's mostly covered in water! This water contains some fascinating creatures. When danger arrives, some of them find some very strange hiding places.

programme.title: The Very Unusual Stalk-eyed Fly
programme.desc: The stalk-eyed fly looks fairly normal as it emerges from its pupa. Then it blows air bubbles up inside its head and along the eyestalks - like blowing up the world's weirdest balloon. It does this to make itself look more attractive to other stalk-eyed flies.

programme.title: Jet Powered Zipline
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts enlist Heni's leaf blower and some science to make the zipline go faster.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Day of the Time Machine
programme.desc: Ricky plays with a time machine app and wishes he could go back in time after spilling paint on a priceless rug. He meets Gaudi to make a salt dough lizard and also learns how to create wings for his shoes.

programme.title: Trip to Korea
programme.desc: Zoe and Alim are surprised to see Milo holding his breath. Did he eat something spicy? No, he's just trying to beat his apnea record. When Zoe wants to try, Milo claims boys are better. Alim takes them to South Korea, where women dive for pearls, and men stay home!

programme.title: Naomi's Birthday
programme.desc: Naomi's birthday is coming, and she's planned it all-including the pricey gift her friends must buy. To afford it, Albert writes homework, Carol babysits, Flippy dances, and Robbie... borrows from Naomi! But will the gift-and the party-be all she hoped for?

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Missing Pteranodon
programme.desc: When an inflatable Pteranodon goes missing from the roof of Pizzamat, Addison and Alex are on the case to find it.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Alim finds Zoe and Milo in a messy pancake-making scene. They laugh when asked if school teaches cleaning. Alim takes them to Japan, where Akiko shows that students not only study but also take turns cleaning and helping in the canteen.

programme.title: Sweet Mayhem
programme.desc: Munki has a sore throat, so Trunk looks for something to help. She finds honey dripping from a hive, but it's not enough. The rest is high up in a tall tree, so Trunk goes to great, even ridiculous, lengths-and heights-to get more honey for her friend.

programme.title: A Snail Tale
programme.desc: On a foggy morning indoors, a big sneeze sends Shelly the snail hiding in her shell. Curious what it's like inside, Luna, Jupiter, and Clyde imagine becoming snails themselves to explore Shelly's tiny home and discover what really goes on inside a snail's shell.

programme.title: Cancun
programme.desc: Cancun getaway: Parasailing with local teens, exploring Mayan ruins in Coba and village of Tres Reyes, spicy chili contest, refreshing dip in Cenotes, and mastering the art of making Guacamole. A week of sun, adventure, and Mexican delights!

programme.title: Jet Powered Zipline
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts enlist Heni's leaf blower and some science to make the zipline go faster.

programme.title: Fart Rocket!
programme.desc: Could farts power a rocket? And Gladiator Dynamite tests Dr Dan and Dr Raph's dunking skills in an epic Body Battle!

programme.title: Doki Digs to China
programme.desc: Oto builds a tunnel-boring machine. Doki suggests they find out if what his grandma used to say is true: can we really dig a tunel to China? The boys set off on a journey to bore right into the Earth's crust, while the girls race them to Beijing, China in the plane.

programme.title: The Art of Space
programme.desc: Four artists display their unique methods of illustrating the mysterious frontier of outer space. Don Pettit, an astronaut, takes amazing photos from the International Space Station. Another artist uses spray paint to portray vivid views of space.

programme.title: Fart Rocket!
programme.desc: Could farts power a rocket? And Gladiator Dynamite tests Dr Dan and Dr Raph's dunking skills in an epic Body Battle!

programme.title: The Defence of the Bombardier Beetle
programme.desc: The bombardier beetle has evolved a special way to avoid being eaten. It mixes two chemicals together in its tummy which then explode out as a mixture of a protective chemical and boiling water. It has to be careful not to burn itself!

programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Go Outside & Play with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's go outside & play with JJ! First, JJ & his friends gather all the pillows they can find to build a giant, cozy fort in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as JJ's family rolls into a campsite for a big family vacation in their cool camper van! Then, join JJ & his grandparents for a fun-filled day at the train park. From taking care of Bingo to having a scavenger hunt at the beach with Cody, there are so many ways to play outside!

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E904 - Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: E226 - iTake on Dingo
programme.desc: The Dingo channel has apparently been stealing ideas from iCarly, so Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to the Dingo studio to give the writers a piece of their mind.

programme.title: E409 - In a Space Pickle / Stare Wars
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with the dumbest aliens in the universe. // Patrick and GrandPat have a staring contest to compete for the last lick of a baking spoon.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E213 - How Zelda Got Her Groove Back Back
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are determined to find Principal Willingham a date so she'll approve a school dance, but disagree on who her date should be. Separately, they set out on their own match-making missions to prove who is right.

programme.title: E306 - SwellMelonFest
programme.desc: Chapa, Miles, Mika, and Bose are thrilled to have landed dates for the once-every-twenty-years SwellMelonFest until threats come in prompting Ray to make them work security. The threats become a reality when the kids must fight The Cell at the event.

programme.title: E268 - A Place for Pets
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners.

programme.title: E409 - In a Space Pickle / Stare Wars
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with the dumbest aliens in the universe. // Patrick and GrandPat have a staring contest to compete for the last lick of a baking spoon.

programme.title: E605 - The Taunting Hour / Musical Chairs
programme.desc: After Lincoln tries to help Lynn get over a heckler at her soccer game, the Louds realize they all have critics. // Lincoln convinces his teacher, Mr. Bolhofner, to join the Doo-Dads in order to get a better seat in class.

programme.title: E225 - Cuddle E. Hugs / Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him! // Patrick wants to be a horse!

programme.title: E110 - All About Steve
programme.desc: Billy arrives, hopeful that his new sidekick Steve can join the T-Force. Phoebe and Max consider it, but soon discover that his superpower is making marshmallows. After they reject Steve's bid to join the team, he turns evil and vows revenge.

programme.title: E805 - Europe Road Trip: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: The Louds travel to London when Luna receives an invitation to Mick Swagger's knighting ceremony but get caught up in a special mission when Lincoln runs into a familiar face.

programme.title: E103 - The show must go on
programme.desc: Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E225 - Cuddle E. Hugs / Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him! // Patrick wants to be a horse!

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E43 - Go Jet Academy: Dream Team Trouble
programme.desc: After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E50 - Horsetail Fall, California
programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: E11 - Sonny's Second Chance
programme.desc: Sonny returns to Sodor to try to be a really useful engine again but some of the other trains aren't willing to give him a second chance.

programme.title: E38 - The Art Of Pink
programme.desc: The art gallery is holding a celebration of the colour pink and Sarah is keen to take part.

programme.title: E50 - Treat
programme.desc: Stanley's friends throw him a birthday party. No work for Stan today. Cynthia and Jose take a call from Amare, her tractor is stuck in the mud. Soon, so are all Stanley's vehicles.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E14 - The Family Photo Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn that friends can be like an extended family.

programme.desc: Evil Pea creates an evil version of her nemesis, Supertato. With the help of her hench-Cobs, Evil Pea makes a big, green lumbering spud that she names Monstertato!

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: E2 - How To Kill An Asteroid
programme.desc: Across the globe, scientists, engineers and astronauts are gearing up for a cosmic battle to hunt asteroids and prevent them from hitting us.

programme.title: E4 - Supernatural
programme.desc: A showcase of Mother Nature's most amazing moments. Features a man eaten alive by leaches and another who pulls a car with his eye sockets. But which is the wackiest?

programme.title: E3 - Mars Is Ours
programme.desc: With unprecedented access into SpaceX, Elon Musk will show the engineers making our mission to occupy Mars a reality.

programme.desc: Find out how wooden utensils, refrigeration units, moccasins, and electric impact drills are made.

programme.desc: As more Brids connect to the quantum computer, they grow more powerful and the computer becomes more self-aware.

programme.desc: Two teams of three strangers are locked in identical barbershops. They have exactly one hour to solve a series of challenges and puzzles in order to escape the room.

programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin:2025-2026
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut:2025-2026
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: E4 - The Crazy Barbecue
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: E19 - Here's A Hyena
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Capharnaumia
programme.desc: A director in love with his actress catches her with someone else. Out of revenge, he cuts all her scenes from the film. The producer finds out and does everything to recover the original version.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf:2025-2026
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: A L'ombre Du Pouvoir, Le Cinema De Costa-Gavras
programme.desc: 1965. Costa-Gavras, a young immigrant fleeing Greece, is shooting his first film, ''The Sleeping Car Murder''. In the cast: Yves Montand and Simone Signoret. How will this man, who started from nothing, revolutionize French political cinema?

programme.title: E1 - The Power of Playtime
programme.desc: Explore the ways that animals use play, including young gibbons in Thailand that practice falling from branches, elderly macaques that preserve their brains with playtime, and games that sharpen the profound intelligence of African elephants.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E107 - Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: E519 - The Treat Thief
programme.desc: Officer Blaze just got his biggest case yet: tracking down the mischievous Treat Thief! With help from Officer Anna, Blaze sets out to stop the thief and recover every stolen treat!

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

News
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news from Tokyo.

programme.title: Health For Today
programme.desc: Difficult to understand medical care is easily explained in this program as well as tips on healthcare.

programme.title: Points At Issue
programme.desc: Specialists from different fields will make commentaries on current event issues.

programme.title: Songs For Everyone
programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.title: Grand Sumo 2026 May Tournament At Ryogoku
programme.desc: Enjoy sumo or Japanese wrestling live from four different cities, six times a year. (where applicable; main audio = Japanese, sub-audio = English)

programme.title: Peek-A-Boo
programme.desc: Bringing out potential and capability of children aged 0 to 2 years by stimulating their feelings with pictures and sound.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NHK's core news program wrapping up the day's events in an easy to understand way.

programme.title: Song Concert
programme.desc: The best of the singers will perform on the gorgeous stage with relays from various places in Japan.

programme.title: News Watch 9
programme.desc: NHK's mainstay evening news program.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: News Commentary
programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Song Concert
programme.desc: The best of the singers will perform on the gorgeous stage with relays from various places in Japan.

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Song Concert
programme.desc: The best of the singers will perform on the gorgeous stage with relays from various places in Japan.

programme.title: Songs For Everyone
programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E7 - Textured Meals For Babies!
programme.desc: On the baby food shelves, purees are being dethroned. A close look at the range of so called textured meals sold in stores. Also covered: naan bread, from tradition to industrialization; miso paste; the origins of the pretzel.

programme.title: E7 - Remonter Piece Par Piece Des Batiments Ancestraux
programme.desc: Craig pumping station in Montreal was dismantled with a view to being restored. In Gentilly, a 18th-century house has been completely rebuilt. Lastly: traditional carpentry at Lefebvre.

programme.title: E19 - Cite Du Vitrail/Aude Franjou/Palomo Spain/Oodelally
programme.desc: The Cite du vitrail in Troyes traces almost ten centuries of history. Meet artist and cabinetmaker Maxim, creator of the Oodelally workshop.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. programme.title: E26 - The Charm Offensive

programme.desc: When the gang caters an important sporting event, Mung and Truffles are at odds.

programme.title: E23 - The Snail Car
programme.desc: When Mung replaces their old snail car with a new one, Chowder can't handle the loss

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: E17 - Tamika And The Beast
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E28 - The Feels
programme.desc: While Max and Gwen revel in the holiday spirit of Winter Wonderland, Ben couldn't be more unamused and focussed on the toys. The Weatherheads set their sights on Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: E24 - The Lollistops
programme.desc: In order to keep receiving the yummy lollistops he gets at the end of each dentist visit, Chowder destroys all of his teeth.

programme.title: E21 - Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: E7 - I Wish I Had Some Space
programme.desc: Ruby and her friends struggle to grant the wish of a very intimidating and mysterious wisher.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E4 - Mexico City
programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E4 - Mexico City
programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E4 - Mexico City
programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Jamie's got a genius way to cook chicken for the crispiest skin ever, and a seriously simple pie with the easiest dough you'll ever make. Two delicious dishes ideal for when you need to get food - and flavour - on the table, fast. And there's more: a treat from the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, who shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: God Of Gamblers 3 - The Early Stage
programme.desc: At the first God of Gamblering contest, Ko Chun is told to lose the contest as his master's interests in betting the champion. Ko refuses and is shot by his enraged master...

programme.title: Rouge
programme.desc: Rouge stars Leslie Cheung as Chen, the never-do-well son of a wealthy and powerful family, who defiantly falls head over heels in love with prostitute Fleur in the 1930's. Disowned and despised, the hopeless couple makes a suicide pact – but Chen finds himself unable to carry through with it...

programme.title: Freedom Run
programme.desc: Te-pei sets up an Angel's Dust scan but finds himself trapped by Hong Kong police led by Chang. They are ordered to cooperate to crack the narcotize ring and suspect rich Chen as the kingpin. This leads to a Yunan martial arts troupe. Chang falls in love with the troupe's star, Hung. Police raid the troupe but find nothing as Hung has unwittingly taken the narcotics. She wants to smuggle herself to America, only to find herself chased by police and traffickers...

programme.title: Heart Into Hearts
programme.desc: Advertising professional Alex, has been living with Chu Lai Ngo and her daughter Vivian, in harmony. Alex has to go to Paris with director Joe, for ad production. Due to the suspicion of Alex's fidelity, Chu and Vivian follow Alex to Paris and cause dramatic argument with Joe. Because Chu feels her relationship with Alex is in danger, she threatens Alex to marry her once they return to Hong Kong. Otherwise, she will marry Alex's cousin and go to Canada...

programme.title: Heart Into Hearts

programme.title: TotalEnergies U-17 Africa Cup of Nations, Morocco 2026 -Cameroon vs DR Congo[Live]
Ferrari Challenge Europe Race 2026 -Trofeo Pirelli Race 2, Spielberg
Ferrari Challenge Europe Race 2026 -Trofeo Pirelli Race 2, Spielberg
LAST MILE
programme.desc: On the day before the Black Friday sale, a box delivered by a global e-commerce company, explodes. The box was sent from one of the biggest warehouses, which has the three-quarter logistic shares around Tokyo. It leads a series of mysterious bombings that terrorize whole of Japan. Elena Funado, who was just appointed as a new director of the warehouse, is forced to control this unprecedented situation with a line manager, Ko Nashimoto. Who planted the bombs? For what purpose? How many bombs are left? - And where are they now? In this modern society, distribution service becomes critical need for our lives and that cannot be stopped. Can Elena and Ko end the serial bombings without stopping blood flowed in “blood vessel”; the global logistics system like a web?

programme.title: Wandering
programme.desc: In a park on a rainy evening, a 19-year-old university student, Fumi, offers an umbrella to a soaking wet 10-year-old girl, Sarasa. Realizing her reluctance to go home, Fumi lets her stay in his place, where she spends the next two months in peace. They take each other's hands and seem to have finally found their place in the world until Fumi is arrested for kidnapping. Fifteen years later, the lonely two are reunited both still suffering from the stigma as the victim and perpetrator of “a pedophile case”. Will the society give a place to their unshakable bond they have formed.

programme.title: Fagara
programme.desc: After her father died, a Hong Kong girl discovers she has two hitherto unknown sisters, one in Taiwan and one in China. To settle her father's debt, she must reunite with them to run the family's hot pot restaurant. While the androgynous Taiwan sister is plagued by her toxic relationship with her mother, the fashionista sister from China is trying to fend off her grandmother's pressure to get married. Meanwhile, she is striving to unshackle herself from her ex-boyfriend in order to start a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie Craftsmen -Cheung Siu Fai
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai, who started his career in television, won the appreciation of director Johnnie To with his precise and solid performance and participated in hit films such as “Running On Karma”, “Election” and “Exiled”. In this episode, Siu Fai is invited to disassemble the design of his classic characters, talk about his friend-and-mentor-like relationship with Johnnie To and share his steadily progressing acting career.

programme.title: Asian Tour 2026 The 45th GS Caltex Maekyung Open Golf Championship -Day 4

programme.desc: A virtuous Hong Kong Police Officer must clear his good name when the drug lord he is after frames him for the murder of a dirty cop.

programme.title: E3 - 老板漲KPI不漲薪
programme.desc: 節目全新升級，以「老友季」作為主題，把觀察樣本聚焦在情感更濃、羈絆更深的職場戰友身上，對職場上下級關系的維度進行了深度開拓；通過職場老友這一切面，去探討職場中更復雜的問題解法。

programme.title: E3 - 用美食描繪新西蘭風情花卷
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E4 - 跨專業求職要克服哪些難點？
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: An all-American candy company makes 200,000 packages of red licorice every day; a zippy mayonnaise packs the punch of spicy Sriracha; 40,000 Turkish bourekas are produced every day; and Laceys feature a chocolate centre sandwiched between two wafer-thin cookies.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 1.8 million cherry chews are produced from just one single batch; massive silos of wheat are transformed into 'elbow' macaroni pasta; a continental cranberry cheesecake first started as a Christmas experiment; and meet chakri, the exotic southeast Asian snack that's hand-twirled and fried to crispy perfection.

programme.title: E1 - Honshu
programme.desc: The wild Japanese island of Honshu hosts an astonishing array of wildlife, and it's a place where people and nature co-exist in the most unexpected ways.

programme.title: E7 - Arctic Predators
programme.desc: Cyril faces down a pack of starved black bears and endures rugged conditions when he embarks on a quest in northern Canada to find lake trout; it is a freshwater predator in the freezing waters of the deepest lake in North America.
